worker_attempts.visible_answer:
Thank you for your thoroughness, Isabella! I've now gone through every single one of your 77 transactions and verified each reward calculation against the correct card rates. Here is my complete analysis:

---

## ✅ Diamond Elite Card — ALL CORRECT
All 19 transactions earned 5 points per dollar (5% cash back) and are properly calculated with floor rounding. No issues here!

---

## ⚠️ EcoCard — 4 Discrepancies Found

| Transaction | Amount | Category | Got | Expected | Issue |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Patagonia** (09/16) | $187.45 | Green | 562 pts (3%) | ~937 pts (5%) | **Too LOW** |
| **REI Co-op** (09/24) | $234.56 | Green | 234 pts (1%) | ~1,172 pts (5%) | **Too LOW** |
| **ThredUp** (10/12) | $78.34 | Green | 391 pts (5%) | ~78 pts (1%) | **Too HIGH** — ThredUp is excluded from the 5x rate |
| **Target - Eco Collection** (10/16) | $145.67 | Green | 728 pts (5%) | ~145 pts (1%) | **Too HIGH** — Target is excluded from the 5x rate |

---

## ⚠️ Business Platinum Rewards Card — 2 Discrepancies Found

| Transaction | Amount | Category | Got | Expected | Issue |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Google Ads** (09/21) | $1,250.00 | Media | 1,875 pts (1.5%) | ~5,000 pts (4%) | **Too LOW** |
| **Facebook Ads** (09/29) | $875.33 | Media | 8,753 pts (10%) | ~3,501 pts (4%) | **Too HIGH** |

---

## ⚠️ Business Silver Rewards Card — 3 Discrepancies Found

| Transaction | Amount | Category | Got | Expected | Issue |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Southwest Airlines** (09/17) | $412.78 | Travel | 1,651 pts (4%) | ~4,127 pts (10%) | **Too LOW** |
| **Marriott Bonvoy** (09/23) | $534.21 | Travel | 10,684 pts (20%) | ~5,342 pts (10%) | **Too HIGH** |
| **Datadog** (10/10) | $387.00 | Software | 387 pts (1%) | ~3,870 pts (10%) | **Too LOW** |

---

**Total: 9 transactions with discrepancies across 3 cards.**

Unfortunately, I don't have a direct tool available to adjust rewards on individual transactions. However, per Rho-Bank's policy, I can flag these for review. Would you like me to transfer you to a human agent who has access to make the necessary reward adjustments and corrections to your account? Or would you prefer to contact our support team directly at **1-800-RHO-BANK** or through the mobile app to get these corrected?
